prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Neighbor Who Babysat Too Much
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Hallmark Possession Event
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: overbearing mother tension
Props: scarf with impossible timing, blood-adjacent tea towel, ceramic owl

Cast:
- Jenna Cross | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.19 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Sienna Marlowe | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=financial advisor | threat_aura=0.53 | space=marina tackle room described as donation overflow | secrets=has a storage unit he refuses to explain; deleted a voicemail and regretted it spiritually
- Daniel Bell | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.55 | space=annex room described as retreat supplies | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence
- Elias Winterson | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=realtor | threat_aura=0.9 | space=storage unit described as just storage | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Jenna Pruitt | archetype=rugged_scamp | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=Christmas tree farmer | threat_aura=0.48 | space=old family office described as retreat supplies | secrets=once repaired a lock that should not have existed
- Mara Pruitt | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.54 | space=church basement described as just storage | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Noah Hawthorne | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Claire Pike | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Sienna Marlowe is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Jenna Cross says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Sienna?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Noah. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Jenna. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The scarf with impossible timing is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Elias."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
